description: Style NoteJust the pair for a weekend by the pool - this pair of sandals for men from franco leone are a closet essential. Hate your claustrophobic formal shoes after a long day at work? Switch to this pair as soon as you're home. These look good with shorts, PJs or casual pants - need more reasons to snag this pair?. Product DetailsBrown forefoot and midfoot straps with a toe holder and a rivet detailSoft footbed with print at the heelTPU outsole with oval nubs and grooves all overMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
